title: craftbrain2000's Mega Mod
description: I plan to take all my ideas for different mods and put them all into one so they can work off each other.
body:
This Mod consists of mostly building blocks, such as 16 different colored wood planks and bricks made from ores.

I plan to take all my ideas for different mods and put them all into one so they can work off each other.

 

As of 1.2.0, the Mod has 104 Blocks!


 Feel free to use in Modpacks!

Feature List:

16 Color Cobblestone Blocks.
16 Color Wood Blocks.
16 Color Stone Brick Blocks.

Three new stone types, Ashnite, Palestone, and Darum.
Darum and Palestone spawns naturally, but Ashnite can only be crafted from Ash. 

Iron, Copper, Diamond, Gold, Emerald, and Netherite Bricks

And More!
